[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101110110 6
1 010001111 5
2 001100000 2
3 001010000 2
4 101110110 6
5 010001111 5
6 111011000 5
7 111111000 6
